raw_consumer_statement: I was charged {$570.00} by a company called XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  I immediately recognized this as a charge we did not make. I called Barclays and they shut down our card and credited the account. A month later they sent a letter saying the charge was legit and put it back on the card. I appealed and appeal was denied. I asked for proof and they sent me photos of the three items. ( Socks, shorts, and slippers ) The company is supposed to be in XXXX but there is no website even though I was said to order online. I also have put XXXX of charges thru this card last 90 days and paid in full each billing cycle. I have tried to hire local attorney but no interest. I will not be paying this charge. Please help. This is a Barclays Aviator Mastercard. Their number is XXXX
